_comment: Copy this file to config.local.json (same folder) and fill in real values. config.local.json is gitignored. Both the Windows PC and the MacBook need their own copy — Windows-only fields can be blank on the Mac and vice versa. See docs/CREDENTIALS.md for a step-by-step credential-gathering guide.

build._comment: Output binary names used in Unity's -cliBuildPath and referenced by Steam VDFs.

android._comment: keystorePath is relative to the project root if not absolute. keyaliasPassword blank = reuse keystorePassword.

steam._comment: Leave username empty to skip Steam uploads entirely. appId/depotIds come from Steamworks partner dashboard.

mac._comment: runMode=ssh drives the Mac over SSH from Windows; runMode=manual prints the command for you to run yourself. keychainPassword is ONLY read by the Mac-side build_mac.sh — the Windows PC never sees it. It's your macOS login password, needed so codesign can access the signing identity's private key in a headless SSH session (otherwise xcodebuild fails with errSecInternalComponent). Leave empty if you only ever run build_mac.sh from a GUI terminal.

playStore._comment: Leave serviceAccountJsonPath empty to skip Play Store upload. Store the JSON outside the repo. track: internal | alpha | beta | production.

testFlight._comment: Leave ascApiKeyId empty to skip TestFlight upload. teamId is your 10-char Apple Developer Team ID. ascApiKeyP8Path must exist on the MAC (Apple only downloads the .p8 once; recommended location is ~/.appstoreconnect/private_keys/).
